title: Verify the 'Pause Trial' functionality and subsequent content locking
description: Test that a user can pause their trial, which updates the UI state and immediately revokes access to premium content.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. Verify the home widget and Trial Corner UI update to a 'Paused' state.
4. Attempt to play any content from the 'Engagement' or 'Trending' sections.

expected_result: The trial status is updated to 'Paused'. The UI reflects this change. All premium content is locked and cannot be played.
